Global (All).summary: Cyberattack on major global bank exposes sensitive customer data, causing widespread financial disruption
Global supply chain disrupted due to labor unrest in key manufacturing hubs, impacting delivery times
Increased tensions between global powers over trade policies lead to economic instability

United States.title: Supreme Court Leaks Raise Concerns Over Judicial Secrecy
United States.summary: The recent leaks of draft Supreme Court opinions have raised concerns over judicial secrecy and the potential impact on the legitimacy of the Court.

United States.title: US-China Relations Deteriorate Amidst Escalating Tensions
United States.summary: The US and China have engaged in a heated exchange of rhetoric, with the US imposing new sanctions and China accusing the US of "Cold War mentality".

United States.title: Rise in Mass Shootings Sparks Debate Over Gun Control Laws
United States.summary: The recent spate of mass shootings in the US has sparked a renewed debate over gun control laws, with some lawmakers pushing for stricter regulations.

South Korea.title: North Korea fires ballistic missile off eastern coast, South Korea says
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military said Wednesday that North Korea launched a ballistic missile from its eastern coast, with analysts suggesting it could be a new type of intercontinental-range missile.

South Korea.title: South Korea says North Korea fires short-range missile
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military said Tuesday that North Korea had fired a short-range missile into the sea, in its latest provocation.

South Korea.title: Seoul warns of potential North Korean provocation during Biden's Asia trip
South Korea.summary: South Korea's government said it was monitoring North Korea's movements during U.S. President Joe Biden's Asia trip, warning of any potential provocation.

Japan.title: TOKYO: Japan’s population drops by 240,000 people in a year to 128 million
Japan.summary: Japan's population has decreased by 240,000 people in the past year, reaching 128 million, according to the country's internal affairs ministry.

Japan.title: Japan to introduce new measures to increase birth rate
Japan.summary: The Japanese government is set to introduce new measures to increase the birth rate, including increasing child benefits and introducing a cash bonus for couples who have a third child.

Japan.title: Japan’s economy contracts for first time in two years
Japan.summary: Japan’s economy has contracted for the first time in two years, growing at an annual rate of 0.4% in the first quarter, down from 0.8% in the previous quarter.
